title: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Cancer - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Transportation > Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Cancer 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions AIDS/HIV Breast Cancer Cancer Medicaid Recipients Older Adults Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CORPORATE ANGEL NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides air transportation for cancer patients, bone marrow donors or recipients, and stem cell donors or recipients on a corporate aircraft. 107 Mill Plain Road Danbury, CT 06811 Eligibility: -Financial need is not a requirement -Cancer patients must be traveling to or from a nationally recognized cancer treatment center -Must be able to walk up the steps of a private jet without assistance, and no need for oxygen, IV, or medical assistance during the flight Hours: Monday-Thursday 6am-2pm, Friday 6am-1pm Email (914) 328-1313 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
